content:
- All required gates are green: docs-build, docs-hygiene, check, test, test-long, and lint.
- Marked the docs-tree task completed with passes=true and checked acceptance boxes, including explicit test-long evidence.
- Ran .ralph/task_switch.sh successfully; next is final git status review, commit all changes including Ralph bookkeeping, and push.

- Task 03 is fully complete and pushed as commit 20a1873.
- Final work: moved Start Here and Glossary into chapter-local paths, updated SUMMARY, removed stale empty docs/src dirs, marked the task completed/passing, ran task_switch, committed all Ralph/docs changes, and pushed.
- Final verification was green: make docs-build, make docs-hygiene, make check, make test, make test-long, make lint; post-commit docs publish also succeeded.
